data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of safely re-driving dead-letter events. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate how dead-letter events are handled or re-driven. The linked use case mentions the ops team replaying events after fixing credentials, but it lacks concrete evidence of the mechanisms in place to ensure this process is safe and reliable, indicating a gap in the requirement fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of mechanisms for safely re-driving dead-letter events.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for dead-letter event re-drive mechanism
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the dead-letter events can be safely re-driven with appropriate checks.
